title: Come Together
why_this_song: Come Together by The Beatles (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Come together, right now, over me"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Come together, right now, over me"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "He one holy roller"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "He got hair down to his knee"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "He say I know you, you know me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "together" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "together" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "right" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "right" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Come together, right now, over me

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Come Together", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Come Together", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Come Together" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Come Together" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Come Together" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Come Together", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
